last_result: The valid negative cvrp_expert_router_proxy_v1 result exhausted the current 98-run cap. A two-arm, six-run ReEvo-inspired reflection-memory cohort is now frozen on a v2 contract with zero data-seed overlap with v1. The adaptation is explicitly not a strict ReEvo reproduction, tests were skipped under the user testing policy, and launch is pending explicit additional-run budget approval.
